goal.goal_text: Launch my online sneaker reselling side business

checkins.goal_text: Launch my online sneaker reselling side business
checkins.checkin_text: Sat down today and finally picked the 5 pairs of sneakers I want to launch with. Feels real now. Going to shoot photos and get the listing live tomorrow.
checkins.agent_response: That's a real decision, not just an idea - five specific pairs is something I can actually track. Tomorrow: photos and the listing goes up. I'll be here to see it happen.

checkins.goal_text: Launch my online sneaker reselling side business
checkins.checkin_text: Didn't get to the photos, work meetings ran long all day. I already know the setup I want though, so tomorrow for sure.
checkins.agent_response: One day slipping isn't a story yet, especially with a real reason behind it. You've already got the shot planned out, so tomorrow should move fast - let's see the listing.

checkins.goal_text: Launch my online sneaker reselling side business
checkins.checkin_text: Rough one, my kid was sick so the whole afternoon got eaten up. Going to knock out the photos first thing tomorrow before anything else comes up.
checkins.agent_response: That's a real disruption, not an excuse - glad your kid's okay. Two days moved now though, so let's make tomorrow morning the actual moment this happens, before the day gets a chance to fill up.

checkins.goal_text: Launch my online sneaker reselling side business
checkins.checkin_text: Same story today honestly, ran out of time again. Tomorrow I'm blocking off the morning for real, no meetings until it's done.
checkins.agent_response: This is the fourth day running you've said 'tomorrow' for the photos and listing - Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and now today. That's not bad luck anymore, that's the actual pattern. I'm not saying don't try again tomorrow - I'm saying let's both notice this is exactly where it keeps stalling.
checkins.pattern_description: Said 'tomorrow' on Mon 6/29, Tue 6/30, Wed 7/1, and Thu 7/2 without completing the photos/listing step - four consecutive days deferring the same task.

checkins.goal_text: Launch my online sneaker reselling side business
checkins.checkin_text: Ok today was actually just lazy, no real excuse. Didn't touch it. Going to really do it tomorrow, I mean it this time.
checkins.agent_response: Five days now - Monday through today - all ending the same way, and you naming today as 'no real excuse' actually makes the pattern clearer, not worse. The photos and listing aren't the hard part here; starting after you've said 'tomorrow' four times already is. Tomorrow's still open - I just want you walking into it seeing what I'm seeing.
checkins.pattern_description: Five consecutive days (Mon 6/29 through Fri 7/3) deferring the same photos/listing step with 'tomorrow,' including today's check-in admitting no real reason this time.
